framework.name: OAuth 2.1 Works Only in Single Trust Domains
framework.description: Existing OAuth works for single-domain synchronous agent ops but falls short cross-domain, async, or multi-user. This bounds where production agents actually operate today.
framework.raw_quote: Existing OAuth 2.1 frameworks, when used with AI agents, work well within single trust domains with synchronous agent operations... but may fall short in scenarios that are cross-domain, highly autonomous, or asynchronous

source.title: [PDF] Identity Management for Agentic AI - OpenID
